blessing: {deity} lifts your banner through {sign}; the road of stature opens.
Under {deity}'s watch, your {planet} in {sign} calls you toward visible greatness.
The seal of {deity} rests on this season: your {planet} in {sign} is a gate, not a wall.
challenge: Yet {shadowDeity} marks the edge: when {shadowPlanet} rules your mood, haste becomes a thief.
Still, {shadowDeity} keeps a stern tablet: ignore discipline, and the harvest thins.
But {shadowDeity} tests all vows; pride without ritual focus becomes a wandering fire.
action: Choose one oath this week and keep it before witnesses.
Set one clear labor at dawn, and let no lesser noise purchase your attention.
Name one fear aloud, then move one step through it before sunset.
timing: When the moon crosses your inner waters, begin quietly and build in public.
At first light of the next cycle, plant the work that future-you will thank.
In the next seven days, a narrow gate opens; prepared hands pass first.
closing: Greatness is present in your chart; fate opens the door, but conduct keeps it open.
The omen is favorable: rise with humility, and the crown will fit.
Your path is marked for ascent. Keep your vow, and the heavens will answer.
